title: YIELD: A Large-Scale Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Information Elicitation Agents

paper.extraction_check: Non-empty extraction inspected at the title/abstract, dataset-statistics table, human-evaluation instructions, sample responses, and final page; page breaks and body/appendix text are present. This is an extraction check, not a deep review.

official_code.timing_boundary: The pinned commit is about 22 hours after arXiv v1 submission and is release evidence, not proof of exact paper-time implementation identity.

official_dataset.timing_boundary: The exact acquired dataset revision was last modified after arXiv v1; it must be audited as current release evidence rather than assumed paper-time data.
official_dataset.snapshot_tree_hash_definition: SHA-256 over lexicographically sorted UTF-8 records path\0byte_size\0file_sha256\n relative to snapshot_path
official_dataset.verification: Every file matched the exact-revision Hugging Face tree byte size; every LFS-backed file also matched its API-supplied SHA-256 object ID.

structural_check.result: All 41 files downloaded; every JSON/JSONL record parsed successfully. Counts are inventory evidence only, not a data-quality or split-validity claim.

official_adapters.timing_boundary: The adapter repository was created after arXiv v1 submission; this exact revision is release evidence, not proof of paper-time model identity.
official_adapters.snapshot_tree_hash_definition: SHA-256 over lexicographically sorted UTF-8 records path\0byte_size\0file_sha256\n relative to snapshot_path
official_adapters.verification: Every file matched the exact-revision Hugging Face tree byte size; every LFS-backed file also matched its API-supplied SHA-256 object ID.

elicitation_package.timing_boundary: PyPI 1.0.1 was uploaded after arXiv v1 submission; it is release evidence rather than proof of paper-time evaluator implementation identity.
elicitation_package.verification: Wheel and sdist matched PyPI-supplied SHA-256 digests; wheel contains the conformity, progression, turn-length-ratio, generation, and dialogue-conversion modules. No metric-validity claim is made.

scope_note: This acquisition advances charter objective A and preserves evidence for objective B/F analysis. It is expansion on a general expertise-to-evaluation and participation question, not a commitment to interviewing as the benchmark scope. Full paper/release audit and any benchmark implications remain the queued reviewer's work.
